prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a geometric Brownian motion (GBM) model, a common approach for stock price forecasting. The current price of TXN is $218.05. For a 20-day forecast, an annualized drift (expected return) of 8% and an annualized volatility of 25% were assumed. The point estimate represents the median future price under this model, while the confidence intervals are calculated using the assumed volatility and standard Z-scores for each confidence level, reflecting the log-normal distribution of stock prices.
